steps.title: Identify Text 1's core recommendation
steps.content: Text 1 argues that because The Nutcracker is old-fashioned and stuck in the past, it “should no longer be produced.” This is a prescription for discontinuation.

steps.title: Find Text 2's response to that recommendation
steps.content:
Text 2 grants that the show is outdated but directly contradicts the conclusion—asserting “it should be kept” and proposing creative modernization, as Debbie Allen's successful Hot Chocolate Nutcracker demonstrates.

A and B misconstrue specific stances within Text 2; C seizes on a supporting detail (income) rather than the central argument.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
